name: Walnut Stuffed Baby Red Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the baby red potatoes in boiling water for 8 to 12 minutes until just tender.
2. Drain and cool the cooked potatoes.
3. Slice off the bottom end of each potato so it sits upright. For small potatoes, cut them in half using both halves.
4. Slice off a third of the top of each potato.
5. Scoop out some of the potato flesh with a melon baller or spoon.
6. Fill the hollowed-out portion with a dollop of sour cream.
7. Place walnut halves on top and tuck in a sprig of fresh dill.
